ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( NOT($Profile.Name == 'System Administrator'), !ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL(Category__c,'Development'), OR ( ISBLANK(SBO_accept_reject_F__c) , LEN(SD_Narrative__c)=0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SD Narrative and Site Build Opportunity Accept/Reject (F) information is being mandatory for Category Development
